home.heroSubtitle: D-Secure ayuda a las organizaciones a borrar permanentemente datos en dispositivos y nubes con flujos de trabajo conformes que cumplen con los estándares globales.
home.trustedBy: Confiado por más de 1000 organizaciones en todo el mundo
home.featuresSubtitle: Todo lo que necesita para garantizar la protección completa de datos
home.feature1Desc: Destrucción de datos de grado militar con regulaciones internacionales incluyendo NIST, DoD 5220.22-M y más
home.feature2Desc: Borre datos de computadoras, dispositivos móviles, servidores y almacenamiento en la nube desde una sola plataforma
home.feature3Desc: Genere certificados a prueba de manipulación e informes de auditoría detallados para el cumplimiento normativo
home.feature4Desc: Administre y supervise las operaciones de borrado de datos de forma remota en toda su organización
home.feature5Desc: Cree flujos de trabajo personalizados para automatizar tareas repetitivas y garantizar la coherencia
home.feature6Desc: Obtenga ayuda en cualquier momento con nuestro equipo de soporte global disponible las 24 horas
home.whyChooseSubtitle: La opción confiable para profesionales de seguridad de datos en todo el mundo
home.reason1Desc: Borrado de datos líder en la industria con cumplimiento regulado en todos los estándares principales
home.reason2Desc: Equipo de soporte multilingüe 24/7 listo para ayudarlo en todo el mundo
home.reason3Desc: Construido para manejar millones de dispositivos con arquitectura nativa en la nube
home.reason4Desc: Estándares de seguridad de grado militar con regulaciones internacionales
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Únase a miles de clientes satisfechos en todo el mundo
home.testimonial1Quote: D-Secure ha transformado cómo manejamos la seguridad de datos. Solo los informes de cumplimiento nos han ahorrado innumerables horas.
home.testimonial1Position: Directora de TI, Global Tech Corp
home.testimonial2Quote: La mejor solución de borrado de datos que hemos utilizado. Fácil de implementar, confiable y el equipo de soporte es excepcional.
home.testimonial3Quote: Cumplimiento GDPR simplificado. Los flujos de trabajo automatizados de D-Secure han optimizado toda nuestra gestión del ciclo de vida de datos.
home.ctaSubtitle: Únase a miles de organizaciones que protegen su información confidencial con D-Secure
home.ctaNote: No se requiere tarjeta de crédito • Prueba gratuita de 30 días
home.enterpriseTrialSubtitle: Pruebe todas las funciones Enterprise en 1 dispositivo
home.enterpriseTrialNote: No se requiere tarjeta de crédito • No se requiere compra • Acceso completo a funciones
home.enterpriseFeature1Desc: Acceda a todas las capacidades de nivel empresarial, incluidas auditorías avanzadas, gestión centralizada e integraciones personalizadas.
home.enterpriseFeature2Desc: Comience a probar de inmediato: sin aprobaciones pendientes, sin retrasos en la configuración, sin necesidad de hablar con ventas.
home.enterpriseFeature3Desc: Pruebe completamente nuestra solución empresarial con 1 dispositivo. Sin obligaciones, sin pagos automáticos después de la prueba.
home.complianceSubtitle: Cumple con los requisitos regulatorios más estrictos
home.verifiableErasureDesc: Cada operación de borrado genera certificados con firma digital que documentan el proceso completo de sanitización con marcas de tiempo y metadatos de dispositivos.
home.auditReadyReportsDesc: Genere informes de cumplimiento integrales que cumplan con los requisitos de auditoría de NIST, GDPR, HIPAA y otras regulaciones internacionales.
home.globalStandardsDesc: Admite 26 patrones de borrado certificados incluidos DOD 5220.22-M, NIST 800-88, CESG, NAVSO, y más para satisfacer las necesidades de cumplimiento regionales.
home.industriesSubtitle: Soluciones de sanitización de datos personalizadas para su sector
home.healthcareDesc: Proteja los datos de los pacientes con eliminación verificable que cumple con HIPAA, previniendo violaciones costosas e infracciones regulatorias.
home.financialDesc: Asegure el cumplimiento con SOX, PCI DSS y GLBA con registros de auditoría inviolables y certificados verificables de sanitización de datos.
home.governmentDesc: Cumpla con rigurosos mandatos de seguridad de datos gubernamentales utilizando métodos certificados DOD y directrices NIST 800-88.
home.enterpriseDesc: Proteja la propiedad intelectual y los datos corporativos con gestión de políticas centralizada e integraciones empresariales.
home.itadDesc: Agilice las operaciones ITAD con certificados automatizados, procesamiento por lotes y cadena de custodia integral.
home.serviceProvidersDesc: Ofrezca servicios de borrado gestionado con gestión multi-cliente, acceso API e informes de marca blanca.
home.servicesTitle: Suite Completa de Borrador de Datos
home.servicesSubtitle: Soluciones de eliminación de datos profesionales para cada escenario
home.driveEraserDesc: Borrado completo de disco e información del sistema con certificación de cumplimiento
home.fileEraserDesc: Eliminación segura de archivos individuales con verificación
home.trustedTitle: Confiable por Organizaciones en Todo el Mundo
home.trustedSubtitle: Proporcionar seguridad de datos de nivel empresarial a escala global
home.militaryGradeDesc: Algoritmos de cifrado de nivel militar certificados DOD y NIST con generación de números aleatorios seguros criptográficamente.
home.enterpriseScaleDesc: Procese miles de dispositivos simultáneamente con gestión de políticas centralizada, operaciones por lotes e integración empresarial.
home.globalComplianceDesc: Cumpla con regulaciones internacionales de privacidad de datos incluidos GDPR, HIPAA, SOX, PCI DSS y más de 26 estándares globales.
home.exploreAllIndustrySolutions: Explorar Todas las Soluciones de la Industria
home.testimonial1: Necesitábamos una solución confiable de borrado de datos para nuestra startup. D-Secure superó nuestras expectativas con su interfaz intuitiva y características de seguridad completas.
home.testimonial2: Como adoptante temprano, estoy impresionado por el enfoque innovador de D-Secure hacia la seguridad de datos. El equipo es receptivo y el producto sigue mejorando.
home.testimonial3: El enfoque fresco de D-Secure sobre el borrado de datos es exactamente lo que el mercado necesita. Simple, seguro y construido con estándares de cumplimiento modernos en mente.
home.dod522022mDesc: Estándar del Departamento de Defensa de EE.UU.
home.fedrampDesc: Programa de seguridad en la nube federal

driveEraser.pageDescription: Wipe Hard Drive, SSD, PC, Laptop, Mac® & Server. Deploy via USB & PXE Boot on Supported Devices.
driveEraser.howItWorksSubtitle: Get started in 4 simple steps — from download to compliance-ready reports
driveEraser.deployDesc: D-Secure Drive Eraser offers the flexibility to wipe drives and devices in both internet-enabled locations and offline facilities.
driveEraser.forRemoteWiping: for remote wiping on Windows endpoints.
driveEraser.complianceSubtitle: D-Secure Drive Eraser supports organizational compliance initiatives by aligning with widely accepted data protection principles and secure erasure best practices
driveEraser.multiArchSubtitle: Native performance across all major CPU architectures and operating systems
driveEraser.x64Desc: Standard 64-bit processors from Intel & AMD used in most desktops, laptops, and servers.
driveEraser.arm64Desc: Modern ARM-based processors for power-efficient computing on mobile, Mac, and servers.
driveEraser.x86Desc: Legacy 32-bit processors for older systems still in enterprise use requiring secure erasure.
driveEraser.featuresSubtitle: Enterprise-grade capabilities designed for security professionals
driveEraser.useCasesSubtitle: Trusted by individuals and enterprises worldwide
driveEraser.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about D-Secure Drive Eraser
driveEraser.faq1Q: How many drives can I erase at a time on one machine?
driveEraser.faq1A: D-Secure Drive Eraser supports simultaneous erasure of up to 32 drives per machine, depending on your hardware configuration. For bulk operations, you can use our cloud console to manage multiple machines.
driveEraser.faq2Q: Does the software support Partition Deletion Wipe?
driveEraser.faq2A: Yes, D-Secure supports partition-level erasure in addition to full drive erasure. You can selectively wipe specific partitions while keeping others intact.
driveEraser.faq3A: No, D-Secure is designed with a user-friendly interface. Simply boot from USB, select your drive and erasure standard, and the software handles everything automatically.
driveEraser.faq4Q: Can I sign my file, like XML, jar file with my e-Signature?
driveEraser.faq4A: Yes, D-Secure supports custom digital signatures for reports. You can integrate your organization's PKI for enhanced security.
driveEraser.faq5A: Yes, D-Secure offers native integration with ServiceNow via REST APIs. You can automatically update CMDB records and create incident tickets upon erasure completion.
driveEraser.faq6Q: Can I track separate Inventory for different types of Drives (SSD/HDD, Mobile, etc)?
driveEraser.faq6A: Absolutely. The cloud console provides detailed categorization and filtering by device type, making it easy to track and report on different asset categories.
driveEraser.faq7A: We provide continuous support including regular software updates, technical assistance, compliance monitoring, and renewal coordination. Think of us as your ongoing partner in data hygiene.
driveEraser.blogsSubtitle: Expert insights on data security, erasure standards, and best practices
driveEraser.ctaTitle: Talk to Our Data Security Experts
driveEraser.ctaSubtitle: Get personalized guidance on deployment, licensing, and audit-ready data erasure strategies tailored to your organization's needs.
driveEraser.ctaFormSuccess: Thank you! Your enquiry has been submitted successfully.

pricingPage.subtitle: Professional data erasure solutions trusted by enterprises worldwide. NIST & DoD compliant with lifetime support and instant deployment.
pricingPage.featuresUpdateNote: Features will update based on your selection
pricingPage.specialPricingTitle: Are You An MSP, Academic Institute or Non-Profit Organization?
pricingPage.osCompatibility: OS Compatibility: Windows, Mac, Linux, DOS & Chrome OS | regulated: NIST SP 800-88, DoD 5220.22-M, Common Criteria | Instant Delivery Available
pricingPage.faq1Q: How do I get my License?
pricingPage.faq1A: Each product license is assigned based on the number of devices you choose. You will receive login credentials to access D-Secure Cloud and the necessary installation files after your order is confirmed. The total number of licenses will correspond to the number of devices selected during purchase. Once the order is confirmed, your product access details will be delivered instantly.
pricingPage.faq2Q: If I order 1000 licenses, how many drives can I wipe?
pricingPage.faq2A: Each license allows you to wipe one drive. So with 1000 licenses, you can wipe 1000 drives.
pricingPage.faq3A: We offer FREE shipping for all physical deliveries worldwide. For digital delivery, you receive instant access via email.
pricingPage.faq4Q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricingPage.faq4A: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, bank transfers, and purchase orders for enterprise customers.
pricingPage.faq5A: Yes! We offer discounts for bulk orders. Please submit a request via our Custom License form to receive a personalized quote with discounted pricing.
pricingPage.faq6Q: What kind of support do you provide?
pricingPage.faq6A: All licenses include lifetime technical support via email, phone, and live chat. Enterprise customers receive priority support with dedicated account managers.
pricingPage.faq7A: We provide continuous support including regular software updates, technical assistance, compliance monitoring, and renewal coordination. Think of us as your ongoing partner in data hygiene.

manual.aboutDesc1: D-Secure File Eraser is a complete solution to maintain your computer privacy by erasing unwanted information from the computer. Erased data is beyond recovery. D-Secure File Eraser can be used to erase files/folders, Unused space, and System traces.
manual.aboutDesc2: D-Secure File Eraser erases files & folders completely from the hard drive. You can select multiple files/folders at a time for erasure. Once files/folders from the drive are erased using D-Secure File Eraser data can't be recovered back. The software allows you to generate and save the reports of the completed erasure process.
manual.aboutDesc3: In addition, it can erase unused space completely such that all the traces of previously stored data are completely removed. When you delete data from a hard drive, the data content is not deleted entirely, instead the space occupied by the data is marked as unused space and the new data is written on that unused space.
manual.aboutDesc4: D-Secure File Eraser also erases all the system traces. Operating systems store records of all activities such as browsing Internet and opening documents constantly.
manual.aboutDesc5: D-Secure File Eraser has a set of 20+ different erasure algorithms, that are accepted globally, to ensure permanent data deletion. You can choose any of the algorithms for erasure process. The software is menu driven, simple to use with an intuitive interface, and requires no prior technical skill.
manual.featureOSDesc: - Compatible with Windows 10/11, macOS 10.15+, and Linux distributions.
manual.featureEraseFilesDesc: - Option to erase selected files or folders from the hard drive.
manual.featureEraseSpaceDesc: - Option to erase the free space to secure privacy from the selected volumes.
manual.featureScheduleDesc: - Supports schedule erasing tasks to run them automatically at specified periods.
manual.featureReportsDesc: - Option to generate and save 100% secure and tamper-proof erasure reports in various formats such as PDF
manual.featureReportSettingsDesc: - Option to customise the reports before saving the report.
manual.featureSearchReportDesc: - Option to search reports by selecting the appropriate date range or erasure type.
manual.featurePreviewReportDesc: - Option to preview the report before saving.
manual.featureSaveCloudDesc: - Automatic report uploaded to D-Secure Cloud Console.
manual.featureStandards: Supported Erasure Standards and Verification Methods
manual.featureStandardsDesc: - Provides 20+ different erasing algorithms with 3 verification methods to erase the data permanently.
manual.featureSearchEraseDesc: - Option to search specific files using name or extension on the system and erase them using a suitable algorithm.
manual.featureThemesDesc: - Option to switch between light and dark modes.
manual.guideDesc: This user guide contains steps to assist you in various functions of D-Secure File Eraser. Each function is explained in detail, in the corresponding sections. This guide covers the following major topics:
manual.guideNavFeatures: This guide has the following features for easy navigation and understanding:
manual.guideNavTip1: Select a topic from the list of topics given on the left of the navigation pane.
manual.guideNavTip2: There are Notes and Tips in some topics of this guide for better understanding and ease of work.
manual.guideBrowser: This is a web-based guide and requires an active internet connection. You can read this guide with all popular browsers like Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Safari. For better viewing experience, it is recommended to use the Chrome browser.
manual.installationIntro: Follow these comprehensive steps to successfully install D-Secure File Eraser on your system:
manual.tabsButtonsTitle: Getting Familiar with Tabs and Buttons
manual.faq1A: D-Secure File Eraser is a professional-grade data erasure tool that permanently deletes files, folders, and traces from your system, making them unrecoverable by any means.
manual.faq2A: No, once data is erased using D-Secure File Eraser with any of the supported algorithms, the data is permanently and irrecoverably destroyed.
manual.faq3A: D-Secure File Eraser supports Windows 10/11, macOS 10.15+, and major Linux distributions.
manual.faq4Q: How many erasure algorithms are available?
manual.faq4A: The software includes 20+ internationally accepted erasure algorithms including DoD 5220.22-M, NIST 800-88, Gutmann, and others.
manual.faq5Q: Can I erase cloud storage data?
manual.faq5A: Yes, D-Secure File Eraser supports Google Drive erasure. You can securely delete files, folders, or entire cloud storage volumes.
manual.faq6A: Yes, tamper-proof PDF reports are automatically generated after each erasure operation. Reports can be saved locally or uploaded to D-Secure Cloud.
manual.faq7A: Yes, the Scheduler feature allows you to set up automated erasure tasks with customizable frequency (once, daily, weekly, monthly) and timing.
manual.faq8Q: Does the software support multiple themes?
manual.faq8A: Yes, you can switch between light and dark mode themes for comfortable viewing.
manual.aboutDSecureDesc: D-Secure is a leading provider of enterprise-grade data erasure solutions, trusted by organizations worldwide for secure, compliant, and certified data destruction.

dataGuardianAward.subtitle: We don't just give you a certificate - we give you our assurance that your organization has the complete setup, processes, and discipline to keep data safe. This badge represents that you are a trusted, safe, and reliable partner for data security.

whatIsBadge.desc: Your gateway to a safe way to trade digital data. The D-Secure Assurance Badge signifies that your organization operates within a trusted ecosystem, enabling secure and reliable data transactions with partners worldwide.

features.verifiableErasureDesc: Tamper-proof certificates with digital signatures and cryptographic verification
features.auditReadyDesc: Comprehensive documentation for compliance audits and regulatory requirements
features.trustedBrandDesc: Build customer confidence with D-Secure certified data handling practices

setup.desc: The Assurance Badge is not just about buying a product. It's about implementing a complete data hygiene process that we can audit and verify anytime.

features.eraserDesc: Automated secure deletion that goes beyond standard recycle bin. Every deleted file is securely wiped on schedule.
features.freeSpaceWipeDesc: Monthly scheduled sanitization of all free space, eliminating any recoverable data fragments.
features.auditLogsDesc: Complete cloud & desktop reporting with timestamps and verification data for compliance.

industries.desc: The D-Secure Assurance Badge is trusted by businesses of all sizes.

questions.q1: What is the D-Secure Assurance Badge?
questions.a1: The D-Secure Assurance Badge is our certification that confirms your organization has implemented proper data hygiene processes. It's not just a certificate - it's our guarantee that you have the complete setup, processes, and discipline to keep data safe and secure.
questions.q2: How long does the certification process take?
questions.a2: The typical certification process takes 2-4 weeks, depending on your organization's size and readiness. This includes assessment, implementation support, and final verification.
questions.q3: What are the prerequisites for certification?
questions.a3: Organizations must implement D-Secure data hygiene tools including our automated eraser system, Free Space Wipe. We provide complete guidance on setup and implementation.
questions.a4: We conduct both scheduled and random audits to verify compliance. This includes checking erasure logs, process documentation, and system configurations. Our automated tools make this process seamless and non-intrusive.
questions.a5: We provide continuous support including regular software updates, technical assistance, compliance monitoring, and renewal coordination. Think of us as your ongoing partner in data hygiene.
